example: The class teacher marked the attendance of all children.
zh: 班導師，負責班級管理和教學的老師
ja: クラス担任、クラスの管理と指導を担当する教師

example: MAM marked the attendance of all children and left the classroom.
ja: 出席、参加（授業やイベント）

example: During recess, the kids were having lunch together.
I think our new MAM is very strict.
ja: 厳しい、規律を重んじる

example: Who among you will introduce himself to me first?
zh: 介紹，讓某人認識或了解
ja: 紹介する、誰かに知ってもらう

example: I think these kids are a bit nervous because of me.
Let us play a game to get to know each other.
My favorite subject is Maths.
She also gave us a math quiz.
The children were singing prayer together at school.
Today I'm going to make some announcements.
PT classes are not happening since the last month.
ja: 体育の授業、体力トレーニング

example: The PT teacher brought with him another trainer.
All the children stood in the attention position.
The PT teacher made us do a workout in colourful hurdles.
zh: 跨欄，障礙賽跑用的欄架
ja: ハードル、障害物競走の柵

example: We will choose two monitors for the PT period.
zh: 監督，班長，負責指導和管理的人
ja: モニター、監督、クラス委員

example: The PT teacher started exercising the children.
The trainer started playing drums on the PT teacher's instruction.
I will pretend to have headache so that I don't have to do PT.
Today's PT period is going to be very tiring.
